title: Insurance Business Development Executive
description:
Business Development & Operational Support

  • Drive business growth with campaigns and track key performance metrics, including adviser revenue and sum assured.
  • Design and deliver training materials focused on "concept selling"
  • Streamline operations to enable Insurance Specialists to prioritize direct adviser assistance and policy reviews.

Subject Matter Expertise & Complex Case Advisory

  • Act as the primary technical referent for Insurance Specialists and Advisers regarding complex applications
  • Provide expert guidance on insurers and claims procedure


Product Strategy & Analysis

  • Conduct in-depth product analysis and market comparisons to equip advisers with competitive insights and tailored solutions
  • Monitor the Singapore insurance landscape for competitor movements, repricing, and regulatory changes (e.g., changes to Integrated Shield Plans or CI definitions) to keep advisers ahead of the curve. 

Sales Enablement & Event Management

  • Partner with advisers to conceptualize, organize, and present at client seminars.
  • Deliver effective sales concepts and presentations to support advisers in client acquisition and conversion.

Platform & Digital Enablement

  • Collaborate with IT, Ops and advisory team for insurance-related platform enhancements, ensuring that digital tools enhanced support adviser workflows and business needs.
  • Gather adviser feedback and lead UAT, ensuring seamless integration of new platform enhancements

Requirement: Proven experience as an Insurance Adviser, with the ability to mentor specialists on technical matters.

postedCompany.description:
iFAST Corporation Ltd is a financial services company with operations spanning across Singapore, Malaysia, Hong Kong and India.


In Singapore, iFAST is Singapore’s leading unit trust distributor. iFAST provides an integrated investment administration platform offering a comprehensive range of services including dealing, investment administration, research support and other services to more than 50 independently-owned financial advisory companies and financial institutions, and over 2,500 financial adviser representatives.

Its subsidiary, iFAST Financial Pte Ltd is a holder of Capital Markets Services License and Financial Adviser's License issued by Monetary Authority of Singapore, and is a CPF-registered Investment Administrator. iFAST Financial also operates its distribution arm, Fundsupermart.com, an online unit trust and SGS bonds distribution.

 

iFAST Corp was awarded the 2nd position in Enterprise 50 (E50) Awards in 2008. In December 2010, iFAST was presented with the Business Superbrands Award 2010 in Singapore. The Singapore Business Superbrands programme recognises the country’s strongest business to business brands.

 

You may read more about us at www.ifastcorp.com , www.ifastfinancial.com , www.fundsupermart.com.
postedCompany.name: IFAST FINANCIAL PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
